description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine brch_2, and is implemented by a call to brch_2. Use this API to tabulate those branches where impedances or other characteristics are such that they may be detrimental to the rate of convergence of one or more of the power flow solution activities. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = brch(sid, all, dotest, tolval)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: dotest
parameters.description: An array of ten elements specifying options. Each element determines whether a specific branch check should be applied. For DOTEST(I) = 1, the corresponding branch check is applied; for DOTEST(I) = 0, the check is bypassed. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: tolval
parameters.description: An array of seven elements specifying options. Each element contains a limit or threshold value used in one of the branch checks. (input).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

dotest.description: check for large resistance to reactance ratios (R/X).
check for large ratio of largest to smallest reactance at each bus.
check for high or negative charging.
check for zero sequence non-transformer branch impedances of 0.0.

tolval.description: >0.8 high tap ratio limit (1.1 by default).
>0.0 and < 1.2 low tap ratio limit (0.9 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
